productDisplayName: Nike Men Egoli TF White Sports Shoes
description: An entry level turf football shoe, the nike Egoli TF cleat comes in a low-profile clean design that makes it a great street casual wear as well.UpperUltra-lightweight synthetic leather that adjusts to the foot shape and works to keep feet locked in place Lace-ups for a snug Fit Contoured speed last for an ergonomic fit Cushioning at the heel provides a more comfortable feel and helps keep the heel from slippingMidsoleContoured sockliner at the midsole for cushioning to reduce stud pressurePU midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionOutsoleTPR outsole engineered for responsiveness and explosive bursts of speed while ensuring excellent traction Firm, yet flexible outsole that helps reduce stud pressure Turf-friendly studs for maximum tractionWash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
